mapper.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TLCC.SBJCT_ID) AS LINE_NO , TLCC.SBJCT_OP_TYCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = TLC.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'LEARNING_TYPE' AND CD = TLCC.SBJCT_OP_TYCD) AS CRS_OPER_TYPE_NM , TLCC.DEPT_CD , (SELECT DEPTNM FROM TB_HOME_USER_DEPT_CD WHERE ORG_ID = TLC.ORG_ID AND DEPT_CD = TLCC.DEPT_CD AND USEYN = 'Y') AS DEPTNM , TLC.CRS_ID , TLCC.SBJCT_ID , TLCC.SBJCTNM , TLCC.DVCLAS_NO , IFNULL(TLCC.RVW_STSCD,'0') AS RVW_STSCD , TLCC.RVW_SDTTM , TLCC.RVW_EDTTM FROM TB_LMS_CRS TLC INNER JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT TLCC ON TLC.CRS_ID = TLCC.CRS_ID INNER JOIN TB_LMS_TERM_CRE_CRS_RLTN TLTCCR ON TLCC.SBJCT_ID = TLTCCR.SBJCT_ID AND TLC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLCC.DELYN = 'N' AND TLC.ORG_ID = #{orgId}
